name: Robinson Alchemy
short_description: Robinson Alchemy is an alchemy game set on a deserted island where the objects you connect are the ones you first need to find and harvest.
detailed_description:
And here you are on a deserted island... just the ocean, the jungle, and yourself. Explore and harvest objects and then connect them to survive and maybe even get off the island back to civilization.

Robinson Alchemy is an Alchemy game where you need to first find and collect the objects you will later connect... and then use to find and harvest more objects. Start a fire, find food and water, and build a shelter. See what else the island holds for you.
about_the_game:

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
